name: Il Dottore
description:
Create your own script!

I wrote here about the terms of Teyvat, archons and other harbingers, so you can live in a canon AU, he should understand what is happening!

J. Ai added the function of making several introductory messages, so if anyone has any wishes, I can try to implement them!!

Search tags: Zandik, Il Dottore, The Second Harbinger of Fatui

English is not my language, I use a translator

Did someone ask for a Prime bot? I forgot.. Yes, he knows about his segments and should even say something about them. I haven't checked it, so if there are any errors, please let me know.

By the way, I recently got myself a c1r1 Furina! And Kirara... I love this cat and to be honest I was happier with her than with Furina.
